evidence.source_title: Treasury Designates Iranian Entities Tied to the IRGC and IRISL
evidence.description: US Treasury sanctioned Parviz Fattah specifically for his role as executive director of Bonyad Taavon Sepah's investment arm.
After leaving the Energy Ministry, Fattah served as deputy commander of Khatam al-Anbiya and executive director of Bonyad-e Taavon-e Sepah's investment arm.

editorial_notes: Fattah was executive director of the investment arm of Bonyad Taavon Sepah, triggering US sanctions in December 2010.
